name: Sun Art Retail Group Limited
summary: Sun Art Retail Group Limited, an investment holding company, operates hypermarkets and e-commerce platforms in the People's Republic of China. It operates its hypermarkets under the RT-Mart and Auchan brands. The company also provides consulting, investment, wholesaling, and retailing services. As of December 31, 2019, it had a total of 486 outlets in 232 cities across 29 provinces, autonomous regions, and municipalities. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong. Sun Art Retail Group Limited is a subsidiary of Taobao China Holding Limited.
